name: Sumire Akane
description: Sumire is a character in Jibaku Shounen Hanako-kun. She made her debut in Chapter 66 of the manga. She is part of the Akane family, to which No. 6 stated that they are that kind of family with children who are offered to God (specifically because of their coveted bloodline). Nene suspects that her full name must be Akane Sumire, and her family name has been confirmed by Teru in Chapter 70. It has not been confirmed whether or not Sumire is Aoi's ancestor yet.

name: Sumire Kageishi
description: [Akiteru](https://anilist.co/character/206365)'s homeroom teacher. Beautiful and intelligent, she's known as the Venomous Queen among the students. She secretly works as an artist under the name Murasaki Shikibu- sensei, though she has trouble keeping deadlines. Her LIME icon is a bottle of sake, since she likes every type of it.

name: Taka-tin
description: __Species:__ Human __Height:__ 208 cm Taka-tin is a foreigner who replaces Taka-chin after he is hospitalized in the contest to become Otsu-chan's Official Fan Club. He speaks with an American accent unless he's saying an otsu suffix. His weapon of choice is French​ bread. First introduced in episode 159 of the anime and chapter 241 of the manga.

name: Takuya Kanbara
description: Takuya Kanbara is the main character in the Digimon anime series "Digimon Frontier". In this series, a group of chosen human children are given the ability to turn into Digimon. Takuya is the leader of this group, and is given the "Spirits of Flame" at the beginning of the series. He is in the fifth grade (sixth grade in the dubbed version). name: Tama Youko
description: A very ambitious and sassy several hundred year old fox katawara. Alongside her human brother, [Jinka](https://anilist.co/character/27221/Jinka-Yamato), she travels the lands in order to try and rid the world of humans and katawara committing evil deeds and spread peace and kindness.

name: Tarou Raimon
description: **Position:** Wide Receiver Split end / Cornerback **Jersey:** 80 **40 yard dash:** 5.0 (as of the start of the Kantou tournament) Monta is the wide receiver of the Deimon Devil Bats American football team. He resembles an ape, particularly a chimpanzee, in many ways; indeed, his simian similarity is the character's running joke throughout the manga. name: Teika  Ichijouji
description: Teika Ichijoji is known as "King" of the school due to his amazing singing voice, which is his specialty and the chairman of the Hoshi Festival committee. Teika is generally a stoic and blunt person who acts cool, but underneath his facade, he is actually a well-meaning, passionate, caring and nice person, even if he doesn't show it most of the time. name: Toki Ninomae
description: Toki Ninomae is the vice president of the class committee. He is well-liked by his classmates and is considered very handsome. ~!Like Otogi, he is a delinquent and hides his personality at school.!~

description: Usami is a Superior Private of the 7th Division serving directly under First Lieutenant Tsurumi.

name: Tou Endou
description: Older twin brother of Saya and a good friend of Kokonotsu. A laid back person who usually wears Hawaiian shirt and sunglasses. He and Saya run a cafe named "Cafe Endō".

name: Touch Me
description: Touch Me is one of the original founding members of the Ainz Ooal Gown guild and one of the strongest warriors in YGGDRASIL. He is regarded as one of the Forty-One Supreme Beings by the NPCs of the Great Tomb of Nazarick. He is the creator of Sebas Tian. At some point in YGGDRASIL, Touch Me participated in an official martial tournament and defeated all of his adversaries. By winning the tournament, he was awarded a special prize that comes in two. name: Veronica Liones
description: Veronica is the second princess of Britannia. The younger sibling of the first princess, Margaret, and elder to her adopted sister; the third princess, Elizabeth. She has a tomboyish appearance, short light colored hair and a slim build. She wears a stylish fur coat, a knight-styled attire, a belt and a pair of long boots. name: Yukinari Ookido
description: Yukinari Ookido is a Pokémon Professor and a major supporting character of the Pocket Monsters anime who lives and works at his research lab in Masara Town. He appears semi-regularly to give Satoshi advice to help him achieve his goal of becoming the greatest Pokémon Master. (Source: Bulbapedia)

name: Zera
description: Zera was a young girl who was the daughter of Zeeself, the Guild Master of Red Lizard. ~!She died in X679 during Blue Skull's raid on Tenrou Island, but was used as Mavis Vermillion's illusionary friend until X686.!~ (Source: Fairy Tail Wiki)
